title: platanthera orbiculata f. trifolia
intro: Platanthera orbiculata f. trifolia, also known as the Three-leafed Yellow Fringed Orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Platanthera orbiculata f. trifolia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or infusion, and can also be dried and made into capsules or tinctures.
